mapper.select:
SELECT g.id AS id, g.id AS goods_id, g.name AS goods_name, g.english_name AS goods_english_name, g.brand_id AS brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.series_id AS series_id, s.name AS series_name, g.category_id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, g.maker_id AS maker_id, m.name AS maker_name, g.is_hot AS is_hot, g.sort AS goods_sort, g.status AS goods_status, gs.id AS sku_id, gs.sku_code AS sku_code, gs.sku_name AS sku_name, gs.price AS price, gs.currency AS currency, gs.cost_price AS cost_price, gs.update_price AS update_price, gs.price_update_time AS price_update_time, gs.barcode AS barcode, gs.weight AS weight, gs.volume AS volume, gs.status AS sku_status, gss.spec_id AS spec_id, gss.spec_name AS spec_name, gss.spec_value AS spec_value, gss.sort AS spec_sort, gi.id AS image_id, gi.image_url AS image_url, gi.sort AS image_sort
ORDER BY g.update_time DESC, gs.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
